title: Complete LocalOutlierFactor sklearn API: decision_function, fit_predict, score_samples, novelty mode
description:
sklearn LocalOutlierFactor exposes:
- fit(X) — fit on inliers (training mode)
- fit_predict(X) — fit + predict in outlier-detection mode (-1 outlier, +1 inlier)
- predict(X) — only in novelty mode (novelty=True at construction)
- decision_function(X) — opposite of LOF, higher = more inlier
- score_samples(X) — negative LOF; higher = more inlier
- contamination param (default 'auto') controls offset_

ferrolearn FittedLocalOutlierFactor already has lof_scores and threshold accessors but lacks the standard sklearn predict / decision_function / score_samples surface. Add them, plus a 'novelty' constructor flag.
